title: Cobblemon: Cruciborne
description: From the depths of the Deep Dark a new Organism emerges going after it is completely optional just let me tell you it is The Perfect Organism.
body:
Ever wanted to evolve the Perfect Pokemon... Well this does just that but this is more than just THE Perfect Pokemon, no this is The Perfect Organism.

Venture down in the Deep Dark and find the creature that starts it all. A creature of spore and ancients. Only then can you begin the journey of evolving the Perfect Organism through Stabilization and Hosts.

This Add-on adds Aliens to the world of Cobblemon.
It offers trainers once finding the creatures to choose to evolve closer to Perfection or to evolve through the natural evolution of the creatures at least as natural as they can get.
It add a 3 sets of 3 aliens from Neomorphs to Praetomorphs to Xenomorphs.
Starting as Neomorphs in the Neolash line including:
The spore carring trilobite Neorith that evolves into the Bloodburster Neoparva and finally into the Neomorph Neolash.
After using another Pokemon to lead the stabilization process you get Praetomorph line:
Begining its evolution with Praetorith the Egg-Tailed-Hugger then into a Chestburster known as Praetarva and finally the Praetomorph Praetolash.
Finally after finding it a host that it is compatable with you can start the perfect evolution:
It all ends with the Ovorith the Ovomorpth that has attached itself to the hugger bringing havic everywhere it goes then it evolves into a perfected chestburster Ripparva and finally becomes The Perfect Organism, The Perfect Pokemon Garnolash.

Lore TBD...
